title: Refusal Receipt
description: A typed projection of a refusal-class ChainedReceipt. Proves that a refusal happened, has a typed structure, is hash-bound, and can be validated. Optionally carries an Ed25519 signature over the canonical receipt body. Does not prove cryptographic identity, legal admissibility, or production readiness.

signature.description: Optional. Base64url-encoded Ed25519 signature over the canonical receipt body (all fields except signature, signature_algorithm, public_key_id). Present only on signed receipts.

signature_algorithm.description: Optional. Fixed value 'Ed25519'. Must be present if and only if signature is present.

public_key_id.description: Optional caller-supplied key identifier. A label only — not cryptographically bound to the signing key. May be absent, null, or a non-empty string. Allowed only on signed receipts.
